name: If ElseIf
subcategory: Things to Know in C++/Java/Python or any language
statement:
Given marks of a student, print on the screen:

  • Grade A if marks >= 90
  • Grade B if marks >= 70
  • Grade C if marks >= 50
  • Grade D if marks >= 35
  • Fail, otherwise.


For printing use:-

  • for C++ : cout << variable_name;
  • for Java : System.out.print();
  • for Python : print()
  • for Javascript : console.log()
  • for C# : Console.WriteLine();
  • for Go : fmt.Println()

examples.explanation: marks are greater than or equal to 90.
